botcomponent.description: Reconcile a customer's BlastPoints loyalty balance after a complex visit (purchases, returns, promo multipliers, expiry) and convert the net balance to store credit. Use when an associate asks about a member's points, or after a return that should claw back previously earned points. The skill runs a bundled Python script that applies the base earn rate, promo multipliers, tier bonus, clawbacks, and expiry, then prints a points ledger and the redeemable store-credit value.
botcomponent.name: points-reconciliation
